label: http api • json_object mode returns parseable JSON matching a simple schema
query: Return a JSON object describing a fictional person with exactly two keys: "name" (a string) and "age" (an integer). Output only the JSON object.
notes: Structured-output behavior, scored deterministically: response_format json_object must yield content that parses as a single JSON object AND validates against the declared schema via SchemaValidator — no judge involved. Off-CI (needs a model).
